headline: How The IMAX (IMAX) Investment Story Is Shifting With New Targets And Box Office Trends
summary: IMAX’s implied fair value estimate edges from US$45.00 to about US$45.27 per share, a small shift that still matters if you are tracking where analysts think the stock should sit. Recent Street research, including higher targets from firms such as JPMorgan, ties this move to generally positive reactions around Q4 results, box office trends, and system installations, while some neutral calls flag valuation questions. In the sections that follow, you will see how to read these evolving targets...

headline: JPMorgan has stark message on Qualcomm stock

headline: How The Callaway Golf (CALY) Investment Narrative Is Shifting With Mixed Analyst Targets
summary: Callaway Golf is back in focus as analysts fine tune their price targets, including moves such as JPMorgan’s shift from US$16 to US$15, while a fair value anchor of US$16.75 remains in place in one framework. These updates reflect a mix of views on recent market share trends, the strength of golf spending, and how much of a recovery story is already reflected in current pricing. As you read on, you will see how these shifting targets fit into a broader narrative and how to track the key...

headline: Jamie Dimon says the next credit crisis will be 'worse than people expect' — here's what big bank earnings have revealed
summary: The banks did well in Q1 of 2026, but JPMorgan Chase's CEO warns the next credit cycle might not be so kind.

headline: How The Investment Story For Darling Ingredients (DAR) Is Shifting With New Analyst Valuations
summary: The latest update on Darling Ingredients centers on a shift in what analysts think the shares could be worth, with one fair value estimate moving from US$64.08 to US$68.33 and several firms lifting individual price targets by US$2, US$5, US$7, US$10, US$12, US$13, US$16, and US$20. Those changes sit alongside at least one upgrade and a cluster of revised targets from houses like Scotiabank, BofA, JPMorgan, and Jefferies. Together, these moves reflect how the Street is incorporating new...

headline: Arista Networks, Inc. (ANET) Price Target Increased to $200
summary: Arista Networks, Inc. (NYSE:ANET) is one of the 10 Best Data Center Stocks To Buy For the Long Term.
